hooks.prompt: Cross-verify the just-completed task. Read .claude/masterplan.json, find the matching step, run verification checks in order: deterministic first (syntax, tests, file existence), then existing evaluator critiques, then harness dry-run if within timeout. Return JSON {ok, reason, violated_criteria, checks_run}.

Before Claude stops, check .claude/masterplan.json for all 'in-progress' steps. For each, run cross-verification. If ANY in-progress step has unfinished verification criteria, return {"ok": false, "reason": "Step X.Y incomplete: [details]"}. If stop_hook_active is true in your context, return {"ok": true, "reason": "loop prevention"} to prevent infinite loop. Otherwise verify and return accordingly.
